title: Daily Briefing — Jun 01
headline: Tech leadership is getting mental while every other sector looks sick — flows, not narratives, are driving this market.
body: Right, so let's look at what the flows are telling us — SPY and QQQ are holding above their 20 MA (SPY 741.12, QQQ 712.35) and tech's got XLK in the 'leading' quadrant with RS=124.6, Mom=105.4. The rest of the market is lagging hard; Financials (XLF 51.33) just triggered a bearish status, and the canary is coughing.

Sector rotation is brutal: Tech is the only game in town, everything else is lagging and flagged as high risk (Energy, Materials, Industrials, Discretionary, Staples, Healthcare, Financials, Utilities, Real Estate, Communication — all lagging, all high risk). If you're not in tech, you're basically fighting the tape. Momentum trades like ARM (+17.8%), NBIS (+16.5%), DELL (+7.5%), ZM (+12.5%) are going vertical, but the non-techs are rolling over below 20 MA.

Contrarian warning: Greed is cooling (Fear & Greed at 59.7, down from 71), but we're not at extreme levels yet. Watch for retail piling in — flows in NVDA, ARM, DELL are nuts, but stay suspicious. The 20 MA is king: any daily close below it = exit longs. Financials breaking support triggers R001 — economy sickness risk. Don't chase — abundance mindset.
callout_body:
SPY: 741.12 (20 MA support), 756.34 (current)
QQQ: 712.35 (20 MA support), 740.38 (current)
XLK: 177.73 (20 MA), 194.81 (current)
XLF: 51.48 (20 MA), 51.33 (current) — triggered bearish status
NVDA: 216.58 (20 MA), 220.91 (current) — watching dark pool flows
Financials (XLF): triggered R001 — reduce risk
Fear & Greed: 59.7 (Greed but not extreme)
Watch for daily closes below 20 MA on tech — that's your risk switch
action_items: Stay overweight tech (XLK, NVDA, ARM, DELL) while they're above 20 MA, but trail stops tight.
Reduce/avoid exposure to financials (XLF) and lagging sectors; flag any daily closes below 20 MA as exits.
closing_quote: If bonds freak out, everything breaks. Don't chase — next trade comes to the patient.
